headline: Meta Buys Robotics Startup Assured Robot Intelligence To Power Humanoid Push As $5 Trillion Market Race Heats Up
summary: Meta Platforms acquires humanoid robotics startup Assured Robot Intelligence, strengthening its push into physical AI through its Superintelligence Labs division.
